scripts.sync: npm i && npm --prefix apps/frontend i && uv sync --all-groups
scripts.deploy:local: bash packages/infra/generate-requirements.sh && dotenv -e .env.local -- serverless deploy --stage local
scripts.remove:local: docker ps -aq --filter network=infra_default | xargs -r docker rm -f 2>/dev/null; docker compose -f packages/infra/compose.sls.yml down -v --remove-orphans
